rationale: In the citing paper, Stephen and Galak (2012) appears only as part of a grouped background citation in the discussion section about prior work on irregularities and out-of-trend observations. The paper does not engage that study's specific earned-media framework, findings, or methods when developing the spike concept, estimation approach, or sales analyses. Because no distinct functional role is assigned to this specific source beyond general literature context, the citation is best classified as a passing mention.
